Details: threshold, invitation, echo, permission, spirit memory, liminal call

The Hollow Gate appears when you stand on the edge of a transformation that asks for your conscious entry. It reminds you that not all thresholds are guarded by force—some wait for your permission. It holds the resonance of choices that echo beyond the moment.

A glowing, surreal archway in the landscape of the soul—soft light spilling from it, as if memory itself had left the door ajar. Vines of old wisdom climb its frame. Beyond it: not answers, but presence.
When you sense something calling but hesitate to cross into it. When a change or return feels near but not yet yours. When you need a quiet place to listen for your own yes.
I walk through what once held me. I give myself permission to become.
